name: Nano Banana
tagline: Image generation through OpenRouter and Gemini image models
description: Registers `generate_image`, which sends a text prompt to an image-capable Gemini model through OpenRouter. Accepts an output path, aspect ratio, and image size, then writes the returned image files inside the workspace root. Paths that escape the workspace are refused.

env.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env.description: OpenRouter API key used for image generation.

env.name: IMAGE_MODEL
env.description: Optional override for the default image model.
